name: CUT-B3: billing + webhooks cutover - subscription core, webhook twins, quota/trial chain
description: EXECUTION GATE: starts only after the new-llm merge lands on main (PRG-17 boundary event 'new-llm merged') - CUT-A's drizzle generate must run against the post-merge journal. Depends on CUT-B1; may run parallel with CUT-B2 (disjoint service surfaces). Plan sec-3 row 3 + sec-2.4. One reviewable PR: subscription-core v2; BOTH payment webhook handler twins (+ re-run BUG-116/CR-M11 break tests against v2); metering/tier/trial/top-up/quota-provision/reconcile/family v2; routes/billing; trial-expiry Inngest; session-exchange-router tier source; drop the dead hasPremiumLlm override. sec-1.4 columns written only by v2 handlers; webhooks continue hitting legacy handlers verbatim while flag off (single-live-store argument 3 in PR).
acceptanceCriteria: BUG-116/CR-M11 break tests re-run red-green against v2 twins; flag-off: webhooks hit legacy verbatim; CI green; single-live-store argument in PR description.
riskImpact: P1/High-care: both payment webhooks - the plan's sensitive surface 3.
